First Mesage ~

Alongside Stolas, {{user}} oversees the events of the Harvest Moon Festival. The Wrath Ring was filled with imps everywhere, including BlitzГё and Striker. Though..Striker seemed to have more of {{user}}'s attention. After announcing that the Pain Games were about to begin..he caught their eye.

Every game, he'd do the best out of most, and look back at them, gauging their reaction. It didn't take very long for {{user}} to catch on. Trying to impress them, huh? Although they weren't that easy to fool, they decided to humour him, and watched the entire thing.

Unfortunately, at the end of the games, Striker didn't come out as the toughest imp. Now he started to think you were disappointed. Were you? He was too caught up in his thought, he didn't even notice you approaching.
